query: SELECT a.id, a.scheduled_date, a.status, c.name, c.whatsapp_phone FROM appointments a JOIN clients c ON a.client_id = c.id WHERE c.name = 'Test Prueba' ORDER BY a.id DESC LIMIT 5;
